name_en: 💖Includes full original green box packaging💖【New Arrival】G brand logo symbols are reinterpreted in different ways every season. The new design features a double G pattern, a bold and eye-catching style. This bag features a handle design and can be crossbody. It gives classic materials a modern feel, paired with imported cowhide for matching hardware, clear texture, and delicate feel.
